name: Focaccia #3
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, dissolve yeast in warm water with 1 tsp olive oil and 1/4 tsp sugar.
2. Stir in the remaining olive oil, salt, and flour until you can no longer stir by hand; mix with your hands.
3. Turn dough onto a floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic.
4. Place dough in an oiled bowl and let rise for 30-40 minutes, or until doubled in size.
5. Gently shape the dough into an oval about 1/2 inch thick using a rolling pin.
6. Make decorative cuts on top of the loaf with a sharp knife.
7. Transfer the loaf to an oiled baking sheet, brush with olive oil, and sprinkle with coarse sea salt (and optional chopped olives or onions).
8. Let rise for an additional 20 minutes.
9. Preheat oven to 450°F.
10. Bake until browned, about 20-30 minutes.
11. Serve hot from the oven.
